evidence.scientific_clarity: Volcano plot clearly shows three categories (up/down/NS) with dashed threshold lines and top-5 gene annotations; directly matches brief.
evidence.typography: Script sets no fonttype=42/svg.fonttype; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type 3 (bitmap) fonts, not editable Type 42; default matplotlib font used.
evidence.palette: Grey/blue/red palette is mostly colorblind-safe (no pure green/red ambiguity); red=up, blue=down, grey=NS follows directional convention correctly.
evidence.layout_density: 6x5-inch figure with tight_layout; scatter points fill plot area well; no gaping whitespace; top/right spines removed for clean look.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure well; legend is inside plot (could overlap data); no axis tick density issue; gene labels use G{index} instead of real gene names (minor issue).
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type 3 (bitmap) fonts — pdffonts confirms DejaVuSans Type 3; fonttype=42 not set in script, so text is not selectable/editable in PDF.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial (PDF 67K, PNG 84K, SVG 91K).
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states thresholds numerically (log2FC>=1, -log10p>=2), identifies all three categories, mentions dashed threshold lines and top-5 labeling — specific and complete.

overall_strengths: Clear, well-structured volcano plot that directly satisfies the brief with correct three-category coloring, threshold lines, and top-5 gene annotations.
Caption is detailed and quantitative, naming exact thresholds and describing all visual elements.
overall_weaknesses: No pdf.fonttype=42 setting: fonts are embedded as Type 3 (bitmap) in the PDF, making text non-selectable and non-editable — a key requirement for publication-ready vector figures.
Default DejaVu Sans font used throughout; no explicit fonttype configuration, which also means the SVG likely has non-editable text paths.
